title: Extract duplicated SVG underline into reusable SectionUnderline component
close_reason: Extracted duplicated SVG underline into reusable SectionUnderline component in src/components/SectionUnderline.tsx and replaced all 3 instances in index.tsx

title: Write unit tests for components
description: Vitest and Testing Library are installed but no test files exist. Write tests for BotCard, StepItem, TimelineItem, and SectionUnderline components.
close_reason: Added 13 unit tests across BotCard, StepItem, TimelineItem, SectionUnderline with vitest + jsdom setup

title: Add favicon and OG image meta tags
description: __root.tsx sets twitter:card summary_large_image but there is no og:image URL or favicon link tag. Add a favicon and og:image to complete the SEO/social sharing setup.
close_reason: Added og:image, twitter:image, and favicon link tags to __root.tsx head

title: Add missing favicon.png to public directory
close_reason: Added favicon.png to public/ directory (copied from logo192.png)

title: Rename avatar files from uppercase .PNG to lowercase .png
close_reason: Renamed all avatar files from .PNG to .png in public/avatar/

title: Remove dead CSS and fix broken dark mode support
close_reason: Removed all dead CSS (unused custom properties, unused utility classes like .page-wrap, .display-title, .island-shell, .feature-card, .nav-link, .site-footer, .rise-in, body::before/after decorations). Simplified styles.css to only essential rules. Added dark: Tailwind variants to all components (index.tsx, BotCard, TimelineItem, StepItem) for proper dark mode support. Added @custom-variant dark for class-based dark mode with the existing theme init script.

title: Fix page title and add proper SEO meta tags
close_reason: Fixed page title from 'TanStack Start Starter' to 'Bin Yahya Bot — Family AI Assistants'. Added proper SEO meta tags: description, og:title, og:description, og:type, twitter:card, twitter:title, twitter:description.

title: Add loading=lazy and width/height to images for Core Web Vitals
close_reason: Added width/height attributes to hero image (384x384) and bot avatar images (64x64). Added loading=lazy to bot avatar images (below the fold). Hero image kept eager since it's above the fold.

title: Remove dark mode styles from all components
close_reason: Removed all dark: Tailwind classes from index.tsx, BotCard, TimelineItem, StepItem. Removed @custom-variant dark from styles.css. Removed theme init script and suppressHydrationWarning from __root.tsx.

title: Guard devtools behind import.meta.env.DEV
description: TanStackDevtools and TanStackRouterDevtoolsPanel in __root.tsx are always rendered, including in production. This bloats the production bundle. Wrap them in a DEV-only check.
close_reason: Wrapped TanStackDevtools in import.meta.env.DEV guard in __root.tsx

title: Install and setup TanStack Query
description: CLAUDE.md requires TanStack React Query for all data fetching, but it is not installed. Install @tanstack/react-query and set up QueryClient provider so bot/timeline/steps data can eventually be fetched from an API.

title: Extract hardcoded data to constants file
description: The bots, timeline, and steps arrays are defined inline in src/routes/index.tsx. Move them to src/data/ or src/constants/ to keep the route file clean and data easy to update.
close_reason: Extracted bots/timeline/steps to src/data/bots.ts and fixed avatar extensions to lowercase .png

title: Fix avatar image file extension casing
description: Avatar paths use uppercase .PNG extension (e.g. /avatar/along-avatar.PNG). On case-sensitive filesystems (Linux/Netlify), this causes 404s. Rename files and update paths to lowercase .png.
close_reason: Extracted bots/timeline/steps to src/data/bots.ts and fixed avatar extensions to lowercase .png
